Package org.eventb.internal.ui.searchhypothesis

Class SearchHypothesisPage

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.ui.part.Page
org.eventb.internal.ui.prover.HypothesisPage
org.eventb.internal.ui.searchhypothesis.SearchHypothesisPage
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.core.runtime.preferences.IEclipsePreferences.IPreferenceChangeListener, org.eclipse.ui.part.IPage, org.eclipse.ui.part.IPageBookViewPage, IUserSupportManagerChangedListener, IHypothesisPage, ISearchHypothesisPage
public class SearchHypothesisPage extends HypothesisPage implements ISearchHypothesisPage, org.eclipse.core.runtime.preferences.IEclipsePreferences.IPreferenceChangeListener
This class extends the default implementation HypothesisPage to implement a Search Hypothesis 'page'. This implementation uses a SearchHypothesisComposite for displaying the searched hypotheses. It also adds a search box for entering the search pattern, a refresh button and a view menu contribution for related preferences.

  • Constructor Details

    • SearchHypothesisPage

      public SearchHypothesisPage(IUserSupport userSupport, ProverUI proverUI)
      Constructor.

      Parameters:
      userSupport - the User Support associated with this searched hypothesis page. This must not be null.
      proverUI - the main prover editor (ProverUI). This must not be null.

    • getHypypothesisCompsite

      public HypothesisComposite getHypypothesisCompsite()
      Description copied from class: HypothesisPage
      Abstract method for creating the main hypothesis composite to be used for this hypothesis page. Client needs to implement this method to provide the appropriate hypothesis composite of their choice.
      Specified by:
      getHypypothesisCompsite in class HypothesisPage
      Returns:
      a hypothesis composite.

      Searches hypotheses with the current string to refresh the view.
